input.field_list:
Id
Title
ManagerId
Red_Hat_UUID__c
Business_Card_Title__c
EmployeeNumber
CountryCode
Email

input.code:
import csv
from io import StringIO

def main(code_input):

    # -----------------------------
    # 1. Get CSV directly
    # -----------------------------
    csv_text = code_input.get("input_data")

    if not csv_text:
        return {"records": [], "count": 0}

    # -----------------------------
    # 2. Parse CSV
    # -----------------------------
    f = StringIO(csv_text)
    reader = csv.reader(f)

    records = []

    for i, row in enumerate(reader):
        # Skip header row (VERY important for Salesforce CSV)
        if i == 0:
            continue

        if not row:
            continue

        records.append({
            "Id": row[0] if len(row) > 0 else "",
            "Title": row[1] if len(row) > 1 else "",
            "ManagerId": row[2] if len(row) > 2 else "",
            "Red_Hat_UUID__c": row[3] if len(row) > 3 else "",
            "Business_Card_Title__c": row[4] if len(row) > 4 else "",
            "EmployeeNumber": row[5] if len(row) > 5 else "",
            "CountryCode": row[6] if len(row) > 6 else "",
            "Email": row[7] if len(row) > 7 else ""
        })

    return {
        "records": records,
        "count": len(records)
    }

input.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        ldap.rhatUUID AS uuid,
        sf.Id,

        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(ldap.employeeNumber,'') <> COALESCE(sf.EmployeeNumber,'')
            THEN ldap.employeeNumber
        END) AS ldap_employeenumber,

        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(ldap.managerId,'') <> COALESCE(sf.ManagerId,'')
            THEN ldap.managerId
        END) AS ldap_manager,

        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(ldap.rhatJobTitle,'') <> COALESCE(sf.Business_Card_Title__c,'')
            THEN ldap.rhatJobTitle
        END) AS ldap_businesscardtitle,

        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(ldap.c,'') <> COALESCE(sf.CountryCode,'')
            THEN ldap.c
        END) AS ldap_countrycode,

        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(ldap.Title,'') <> COALESCE(sf.Title,'')
            THEN ldap.Title
        END) AS ldap_title,

        sf.Business_Card_Title__c,
        sf.EmployeeNumber,
        sf.ManagerId,
        sf.CountryCode,
        sf.Title,
        ldap.LastModifiedDate

    FROM (
        SELECT 
            l.employeeNumber,
            l.c,
            l.Title,
            sf.column_1 AS managerId,
            l.LastModifiedDate,
      
      SUBSTR(TRIM(l.rhatJobTitle), 1, 80) AS rhatJobTitle,
      
           
            l.rhatUUID
        FROM ldap_users_staging l
        LEFT JOIN userManagerid_ldap sf
            ON l.Manager = sf.column_0
      		WHERE l.rhatUUID IS NOT NULL
    ) ldap

    JOIN sf_users_staging sf
        ON ldap.rhatUUID = sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c
  		AND ldap.rhatUUID IS NOT NULL
   		AND sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c IS NOT NULL
  		AND sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c <> ''

    GROUP BY 
        ldap.rhatUUID,
        sf.Id,
        sf.Business_Card_Title__c,
        sf.EmployeeNumber,
        sf.ManagerId,
        sf.CountryCode,
        sf.Title,
        ldap.LastModifiedDate

) changes

WHERE uuid IS NOT NULL
  AND (
        ldap_employeenumber IS NOT NULL
     OR ldap_title IS NOT NULL
     OR ldap_manager IS NOT NULL
     OR ldap_businesscardtitle IS NOT NULL
     OR ldap_countrycode IS NOT NULL
  )

    "VNM": "VN",
    "VGB": "VG",
    "VIR": "VI",
    "WLF": "WF",
    "ESH": "EH",
    "YEM": "YE",
    "ZMB": "ZM",
    "ZWE": "ZW"
}

def main(records_input):
    parsed_users = []

    # Normalize input into a list
    if isinstance(records_input, str):
        try:
            records_list = json.loads(records_input)
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            records_list = []
    elif isinstance(records_input, list):
        records_list = records_input
    elif isinstance(records_input, dict):
        inner = records_input.get("records", [])
        if isinstance(inner, str):
            try:
                records_list = json.loads(inner)
            except json.JSONDecodeError:
                records_list = []
        elif isinstance(inner, list):
            records_list = inner
        else:
            records_list = []
    else:
        records_list = []

    # Process each record
    for record in records_list:
        payload_raw = record.get("column_1")
        if not payload_raw:
            continue

        payload = payload_raw
        for _ in range(2):
            if isinstance(payload, str):
                try:
                    payload = json.loads(payload)
                except json.JSONDecodeError:
                    payload = {}
                    break
            else:
                break

        if not isinstance(payload, dict):
            continue

        user = payload.get("Resource", {}).get("User", {})
        if not isinstance(user, dict) or not user:
            continue

        # Add metadata fields
        user["id"] = record.get("column_0")
        user["lastModifiedDate"] = record.get("column_2")

        #  Map country if available
        country_code = user.get("Country")
        if country_code:
            user["countryMapped"] = COUNTRY_MAP.get(country_code, None)

        parsed_users.append(user)

    return {"output": parsed_users}

input.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        urtl.UUID AS uuid,
        sf.Id,

        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(urtl.manager,'') <> COALESCE(sf.ManagerId,'')
            THEN urtl.manager
        END) AS urtl_manager,

        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(urtl.CountryCode,'') <> COALESCE(sf.CountryCode,'')
            THEN urtl.CountryCode
        END) AS urtl_countrycode,

        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(urtl.Title,'') <> COALESCE(sf.Title,'')
            THEN urtl.Title
        END) AS urtl_title,

        sf.ManagerId,
        sf.CountryCode,
        sf.Title,
        urtl.LastModifiedDate,
        sf.EmployeeNumber,
        sf.Business_Card_Title__c

    FROM (
        SELECT 
            ManagerEmployeeNumber,
            CountryCode,
            Title,
            manager,
            LastModifiedDate,
            UUID
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                u.ManagerEmployeeNumber,
                u.CountryCode,
                u.Title,
                m.id AS manager,
                u.LastModifiedDate,
                u.UUID,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY u.UUID 
                    ORDER BY u.LastModifiedDate DESC, COALESCE(m.id, 0) DESC
                ) AS rn
            FROM URTL u
            LEFT JOIN UserManagerId m 
                ON u.ManagerEmployeeNumber = m.EmployeeNumber
        ) t
        WHERE rn = 1
    ) urtl

    JOIN sf_users_staging sf
        ON urtl.UUID = sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c
        AND urtl.UUID IS NOT NULL
        AND sf.Red_Hat_UUID__c IS NOT NULL

    GROUP BY 
        urtl.UUID,
        sf.Id,
        sf.ManagerId,
        sf.CountryCode,
        sf.Title,
        urtl.LastModifiedDate,
        sf.EmployeeNumber,
        sf.Business_Card_Title__c

) changes

WHERE 
      urtl_title IS NOT NULL
   OR urtl_manager IS NOT NULL
   OR urtl_countrycode IS NOT NULL;

input.result_schema_json: [{"control_type":"text","label":"UUID","name":"uuid","type":"string","optional":false},{"control_type":"text","label":"ID","name":"Id","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Employee Number","name":"sf_employeeNumber","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Business Card Title","name":"sf_Business_Card_Title__c","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Manager ID","name":"sf_managerId","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Country Code","name":"sf_countryCode","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"SF Title","name":"sf_title","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"LDAP Employee Number","name":"ldap_employeeNumber","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"LDAP Business Card Title","name":"ldap_BusinessCardTitle","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"Manager ID","name":"managerID","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"Country Code","name":"countrycode","type":"string","optional":true},{"control_type":"text","label":"Title","name":"title","type":"string","optional":true}]
input.sql:
SELECT 
COALESCE(L.uuid,U.uuid) AS uuid,

-- Id and SF fields (prefer LDAP when UUID exists there)
COALESCE(L.Id,U.Id) AS Id,
L.sf_employeeNumber AS sf_employeeNumber,
L.sf_Business_Card_Title__c AS sf_Business_Card_Title__c,

CASE 
WHEN L.lastModifiedDate > U.urtl_lastmodifieddate 
     OR U.urtl_lastmodifieddate IS NULL
THEN L.sf_managerId
ELSE U.sf_managerId
END AS sf_managerId,

CASE 
WHEN L.lastModifiedDate > U.urtl_lastmodifieddate 
     OR U.urtl_lastmodifieddate IS NULL
THEN L.sf_countryCode
ELSE U.sf_countryCode
END AS sf_countryCode,

CASE 
WHEN L.lastModifiedDate > U.urtl_lastmodifieddate 
     OR U.urtl_lastmodifieddate IS NULL
THEN L.sf_title
ELSE U.sf_title
END AS sf_title,

-- LDAP values
L.ldap_employeeNumber,
L.ldap_BusinessCardTitle,

CASE 
WHEN L.lastModifiedDate > U.urtl_lastmodifieddate 
     OR U.urtl_lastmodifieddate IS NULL
THEN L.ldap_managerID
ELSE U.urtl_managerID
END AS managerID,

CASE 
WHEN L.lastModifiedDate > U.urtl_lastmodifieddate 
     OR U.urtl_lastmodifieddate IS NULL
THEN L.ldap_countrycode
ELSE U.urtl_countrycode
END AS countrycode,

CASE 
WHEN L.lastModifiedDate > U.urtl_lastmodifieddate 
     OR U.urtl_lastmodifieddate IS NULL
THEN L.ldap_title
ELSE U.urtl_title
END AS title

FROM LDAP_updates L
LEFT JOIN URTL_updates U
ON L.uuid = U.uuid


UNION

SELECT 
COALESCE(L.uuid,U.uuid) AS uuid,

U.Id,
U.sf_employeeNumber,
U.sf_Business_Card_Title__c,
U.sf_managerId,
U.sf_countryCode,
U.sf_title,

L.ldap_employeeNumber,
L.ldap_BusinessCardTitle,
U.urtl_managerID,
U.urtl_countrycode,
U.urtl_title

FROM URTL_updates U
LEFT JOIN LDAP_updates L
ON L.uuid = U.uuid
WHERE L.uuid IS NULL;

block.comment: Query for final Updates from LDAP & URTL
